name: wc2026-live
description: FIFA World Cup 2026 companion app — live scores, fixtures, groups, knockout bracket, commentary, news.

scripts.sync:web: rm -rf www && mkdir www && cp -r index.html manifest.json sw.js assets www/
scripts.cap:add: npm run sync:web && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
